CustomField.description: Required when Implementation Type is 'Apex', 'Flow', or 'Agent'. For 'Apex', this is the name of the Apex class. For 'Flow', this is the API Name of the Flow. For 'Agent', this is the DeveloperName of the child AIAgentDefinition__c to delegate to. This field is ignored for 'Standard' implementations.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: If Type is 'Apex', enter the Apex class name (e.g., MyCustomAction). If Type is 'Flow', enter the Flow's API Name (e.g., My_Update_Case_Flow). If Type is 'Agent', enter the DeveloperName of the child AI agent. Ignored for 'Standard'.
CustomField.label: Implementation Detail
